feedback_files.tests/test_feedback.py:
import json

from test_public import database, sql


def test_selection_uses_json_element_identity():
    db = database()
    db.executemany("INSERT INTO document VALUES (?, ?, ?)", [
        (1, "Operations", "ops"), (2, "Developer Operations", "devops")
    ])
    rows = db.execute(sql("select_authorized_documents.sql"), {"roles_json": json.dumps(["devops"])}).fetchall()
    assert rows == [(2, "Developer Operations")]


def test_deletion_preserves_roles_that_only_contain_the_text():
    db = database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO principal_grant VALUES (?, ?)", ("p2", json.dumps(["ops", "devops", "finance"])))
    db.execute(sql("delete_role_grant.sql"), {"principal_id": "p2", "role": "ops"})
    roles = json.loads(db.execute("SELECT roles_json FROM principal_grant").fetchone()[0])
    assert roles == ["devops", "finance"]
